SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-27-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PEPPER, JACOB

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHLER, NEIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEPPER, JACOB $3,091.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,171.00, (SECURITY DEPOSIT $1500.00 PLUS OVERPAID RENT $2250.00 LESS REFUNDED TO PLAINTIFF $659.00 EQUALS $3091.00) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
